metadata.note: Tiny proof-run payload for a product-specific Benzoin Siam Resinoid evidence candidate from the downloaded PDS. Promotion remains limited to low-risk helper seed fields.

notes: Document-backed from the downloaded M0067632_PDS.pdf file in the source-document registry.
Local PDF inspection classified this source as canonical_target_likely_matches and surfaced the product identity 'Benzoin resinoid on carrier'.
Prepared from the product CAS line in the PDS, which lists product CAS 9000-72-0 separately from the carrier Triethyl Citrate CAS 77-93-0.
